# uapi_dhcp_odhcpd (Resource)

A odhcpd settings.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uapi_dhcp_odhcpd" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `leasefile` (String) uci option leasefile.
- `leasetrigger` (String) uci option leasetrigger.
- `loglevel` (Number) uci option loglevel.
- `maindhcp` (Boolean) uci option maindhcp.

### Read-Only

- `etag` (String) Opaque ETag of the resource's current state, used for If-Match optimistic concurrency.
- `id` (String) Stable resource id assigned by uapi (a prefixed ULID).
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
